action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 5 (5M timesteps multi-task PPO) yielded 0.0 success_rate (actually 0.002). Training curve shows mean episodic reward ~0.05-0.1, almost no success episodes. Analysis: Multi-task PPO across 10 diverse Minigrid environments with sparse rewards fails to learn meaningful behaviors. The policy needs to solve fundamentally different tasks (navigation, key-door, lava crossing) using a single set of parameters, causing interference and weak gradients. Additionally, partial observability (7x7 grid) likely benefits from memory. Decision: Switch to separate policies per environment using RecurrentPPO with LSTM for memory. Train each environment for 2M timesteps (~22 min each, total ~220 min), update predict.py to load per-environment models and manage LSTM hidden states. Execute all trainings sequentially in one iteration to save iterations, then submit eval.
action.command: python train_env.py --env_id "MiniGrid-DoorKey-8x8-v0" --timesteps 2000000 && python train_env.py --env_id "MiniGrid-FourRooms-v0" --timesteps 2000000 && python train_env.py --env_id "MiniGrid-KeyCorridorS3R3-v0" --timesteps 2000000 && python train_env.py --env_id "MiniGrid-LockedRoom-v0" --timesteps 2000000 && python train_env.py --env_id "MiniGrid-Dynamic-Obstacles-8x8-v0" --timesteps 2000000 && python train_env.py --env_id "MiniGrid-LavaCrossingS9N2-v0" --timesteps 2000000 && python train_env.py --env_id "MiniGrid-UnlockPickup-v0" --timesteps 2000000 && python train_env.py --env_id "MiniGrid-MultiRoom-N4-S5-v0" --timesteps 2000000 && python train_env.py --env_id "MiniGrid-LavaGapS7-v0" --timesteps 2000000 && python train_env.py --env_id "MiniGrid-DistShift1-v0" --timesteps 2000000
